name: @alhwyn/luma-cli
description: CLI for the unofficial Luma API SDK

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --packages=external && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/index.tmp && mv dist/index.tmp dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
